overview.description: PvP battle royale event where 10+ Chiefs compete on a shared battlefield for Strategic Points via supply chests and airdrops

participation.note: Attempts only consumed on successful matchmaking

battlefield.airdrops: Crates dropped every 2 minutes, starting 90 seconds after battle begins
battlefield.strategic_points: Earned from collecting Strategic Supply Chests and Airdrop Item Crates

items.smoke_bomb: Renders city invisible for 120 seconds, prevents selection/attacks

rules.counter_recon: Only applies to castles, not garrisoned buildings

notes: Initially Christmas 2025 limited event, now recurring. Detailed reward tiers and point breakdowns not yet documented.
